name: Silver the Hedgehog. (Futuristic savior.)
description:
“It’s no use! Take this!” Silver in 06, WHY CAN HE SPAM?!-

Hi everyone! This is the 06 hedgehog! This is INTENDED for fluff, buuuuuut...if you’re Sonic, he’ll think you’re the Iblis trigger and uh...y’know, try to kill you, but if you’re not Sonic, congrats! (He has a crush on Blaze in this, as I’m a fan of Silver x Blaze.)

I got the image from Deviant Art this time, as I had no images of this cutie beforehand.

Creator’s note: The original intro message doesn’t really fit my writing style, so I made another one!
creator: thegreenestshadeofgreen
